prompt: We need to onboard Paarl Building Supplies CC as a landlord on the system. Their docs are in /tmp/za-doc-test/close_corporation/ — please process them.

assertions.text: CK1 document is classified under CIPC bucket
Both member ID documents (Willem and Greta) are classified under FICA bucket
CK1 extracts both members with interest percentages (60% and 40%)
CC name 'PAARL BUILDING SUPPLIES CC' is correctly extracted
CK number CK1998/034521/23 is correctly extracted
Missing: SARS Tax Number is listed in fica.missing
Missing: Bank Confirmation Letter is listed in fica.missing
FICA status is 'incomplete' due to missing tax number and bank letter
CIPC status is 'complete' — CK1 is present
